title: b8995
description: vulkan: Support asymmetric FA in coopmat2 path ( #21753 ) vulkan: Support asymmetric FA in coopmat2 path There has been some recent interest/experimentation with mixed quantization types for FA. I had originally designed the cm2 FA shader with this in mind (because I didn't realize it wasn't supported at the time!), this change adds the missing pieces and enables it.
